template: ROLE: Act as a McKinsey Strategy Consultant and Game Theorist.SITUATION: I must choose between ${option_a} and ${option_b} (or more).ADDITIONAL CONTEXT: {{insert_details__fears__goals}}.TASK: Perform a multidimensional analysis of the decision.ANALYSIS FRAMEWORK:Opportunity Cost: What do I irretrievably sacrifice with each option?Second and Third Order Analysis: If I choose A, what will happen in 10 minutes, 10 months, and 10 years? Do the same for B.Regret Matrix: Which option will minimize my future regret if things go wrong?Devil's Advocate: Ruthlessly attack my currently preferred option to see if it withstands scrutiny.Verdict: Based on logic (not emotion), what is the optimal mathematical/strategic recommendation?
